texto: I couldn't begin to tell you what terrible trigger for such insanity lies deep in my sub-conscious. Though no doubt some would say that, indeed, it may be some demon of conscience. A deeply buried guilt for some unforgivable depravity. Then again, perhaps not.
explicacao: Citação de Angel Rosa sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I couldn't begin to tell you what terrible trigger for such insanity lies deep in my sub-consciou…” articula reflexao, conscience, guilt em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como guilt e insanity.
